title: Venom
body:
- **This Data Pack Lets You Transform Into Venom**
- **---------------------------------------------**
- **To Transform Into Venom You Will Need To Craft A Capsule With Venom Inside Look At The Recipe In The Gallery Tap, After You Craft The Capsule With Venom Inside Sneak And Right Click To Put Venom On You, When He's On You Go To The 8th Slot And Right Click To Transform Into Him**

And To Remove Venom Craft Another Capsule But A Empty One. When You Get The Empty Capsule Walk Into A Fire And Put The Capsule In Your Offhand To Remove Venom From You.

This Data Pack Was Fun To Make And I Hope You Injoy This :)

Venom Also Got A Walking Animation.

And By Using The Venom's Grapple Ability You Can Pull Some Two Blocks To You, The Crafting Table And The Bell, You Can Also Pull All Entities To You.

I’m Making A Carnage Boss Fight It Will Probably Be Out One The 9th
